title: Data is not stored in SQLite or any embedded DB
evidence: src/main.rs:37-40 uses process-global lazy_static Mutex<Vec<Book>> in-memory storage; Cargo.toml lists no DB dependency (rusqlite/sqlx/diesel); README.md states 'uses in-memory storage ... without external dependencies like a database'. All data is lost on restart.
suggestion: Persist books in SQLite (e.g. rusqlite or sqlx with the bundled sqlite feature) so the storage requirement is met.

title: Tests share process-global mutable store, risking order-dependent flakiness
evidence: src/main.rs:37-40 BOOKS is a single lazy_static global; test_create_and_get_book (main.rs:166) mutates it while test_list_books (main.rs:200) reads it — each test builds its own App but they alias the same global Vec, so assertions are coupled to execution order.
suggestion: Inject store as web::Data per-App (or reset state per test) so cases are independent.

title: ?author= filter uses substring match rather than exact author match
evidence: src/main.rs:82-84 filtered.retain(|b| b.author.contains(author)); a query of author=Doe also matches 'John Doe Jr' and any superstring.
suggestion: Compare with == for exact author matching, or document the substring behavior as intended.

title: Validation only covers non-empty title/author on create, not on update
evidence: src/main.rs:48-54 validates create_book; update_book (main.rs:103-130) accepts empty title/author with no validation.
suggestion: Apply the same non-empty title/author validation in update_book.
